name: SKELETON_CANCER__MEMBER_LOOKUP__TARGET_PAIR__ALL_TIME
description: Independent frame skeleton for discovering target pairs under a cancer-expression constraint.
cypher_template:
MATCH (t:Target)-[:DIFFERENTIAL_AND_HIGHLY_EXPRESSED_IN]->(c:Cancer {name: $cancer})
MATCH (t)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 50
examples: For targets that are highly expressed in COAD, what target pairs involve them?
For targets that are highly expressed in KIRC, what target pairs involve them?
For targets that are highly expressed in SARC, what target pairs involve them?
